description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a mix of exposed brick and smooth white exterior walls. The front facade includes large glass windows and a balcony with a glass railing, providing ample natural light to the interior. The lower level has a sheltered entryway supported by a column, flanked by two potted plants and a large window. The upper level includes a partially enclosed terrace with a transparent roof and patterned flooring, as well as a private room with a marble-like surface. The rear and side facades are more minimal, with limited window openings and clean, uninterrupted wall surfaces. The overall structure is compact, with a flat roof and a clear separation between public and private spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, exposed brick, and a partially enclosed upper terrace. The design features clean lines, a sheltered entryway, and a mix of transparent and solid surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, balcony with glass railing, and potted plants.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid white walls and minimal window openings, highlighting the enclosed upper terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by plain white walls and a small window, with the glass terrace roof visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large window, exterior wall lights, and potted plants, with the terrace roof extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony
attribute_entryway_design: Sheltered entryway with a single door, flanked by potted plants and a large window, no porch or steps, minimalistic modern style
